prompt: Create a photorealistic wide-angle street photograph in a quiet traditional Japanese neighborhood, looking straight down an empty residential road lined with old wooden houses, tiled roofs, concrete walls, small gardens, utility poles, overhead power lines, a streetlamp, parked compact cars, and a blue no-parking road sign. In the far background, place a large snow-capped Mount Fuji centered at the end of the street under a clear deep blue sky. Across the upper sky, form one enormous white cloud-like Japanese character reading 雪, as if written with soft fluffy clouds or vapor trails, semi-translucent and naturally lit, spanning almost the full width of the frame above the mountain. Use realistic midday sunlight with crisp shadows, documentary travel-photography composition, high detail, natural colors, atmospheric depth, and no people in the foreground.
